description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a collapsible stock and a detachable box magazine. The rifle has a long, standard barrel with a flash hider at the muzzle, and a prominent handguard with Picatinny rails for accessory mounting. The upper receiver is equipped with iron sights, including a front post and a rear aperture. The pistol grip and adjustable stock are both ergonomically designed for comfort and control. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, typical of contemporary urban rifles. The design is streamlined and functional, suitable for use in a variety of urban environments.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, detachable magazine, iron sights, and a standard barrel with a flash hider.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, flash hider, and narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, collapsible stock, pistol grip, magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with details of the handguard and magazine.
